title: StellarMon: Moonfall
subtitle: When the Moon Killed the World
genre: Space Exploration RPG / Colony Sim / Creature Collector

platform_specs.aesthetic: Stereoscopic 3D, dual screen UI, clean low-poly

story_hook: 200 years ago, the Moon fell. Not an impact—a transformation. Luna cracked open like an egg, and from it poured the Cosmic Seeds: dormant Pokémon DNA from before Earth's formation. The world was reshaped. Gravity failed in places. The oceans floated. Humanity fled to orbital colonies. Now, you are a Starbound Ranger, taming Void Pokémon in the wreckage of old Earth and the colonies beyond. But something is waking on the dark side of the Moon. Something that remembers.
core_loop:
1. Pilot your colony ship between orbital zones (space map)
2. Land on shattered Earth fragments or colony stations
3. Discover and tame Cosmic Pokémon variants (Vacuum Balls)
4. Build colonies, manage oxygen, grow food
5. Defend against Void Breeder raids
6. Unlock warp gates to reach the Moon and confront Eclipse Mewtwo
legendary_boss: Eclipse Mewtwo (Dark Side of the Moon base)
controls: Circle Pad + D-Pad + A/B/X/Y + L/R + Touch Screen

chapters.title: Orphan of Earth
chapters.summary: You were born on Colony 7. Your first mission: retrieve a drifting Poké Ball manufacturing satellite. Inside: a Void Eevee.

chapters.title: Lunar Shadow
chapters.summary: The Moon colonies are failing. Terraform the surface, establish oxygen generators, and discover why colonists are vanishing.

chapters.title: Red Dust
chapters.summary: Mars is halfway habitable. Plant Terraforming Seeds, defend against dust storms, and find the ancient Pokémon buried in Olympus Mons.

chapters.title: The Belt
chapters.summary: The Asteroid Belt is lawless. Pirate gyms rule individual rocks. Earn the 8 Belt Badges to unlock the warp gate.

chapters.title: Void Breach
chapters.summary: The Void Breeders attack in force. Their ships are grown, not built—bio-mechanical Pokémon hybrids. Board them. Capture them.

chapters.title: The Eclipse
chapters.summary: On the dark side of the Moon, Eclipse Mewtwo waits. It remembers Earth. It remembers you. The Cosmic Seed must be planted—or destroyed.

mod_ideas.name: Hardcore Mode
mod_ideas.description: Permadeath. No RadAway. Poké Balls break after 3 uses.

mod_ideas.name: New Game+
mod_ideas.description: Carry over mutation research. Enemies scale. New legendary spawns.

mod_ideas.name: Co-op Companion
mod_ideas.description: Second player controls your lead Pokémon in split-screen.

mod_ideas.name: Satellite Defense
mod_ideas.description: Tower defense mod for colony ships. Deploy Pokémon as turrets.

mod_ideas.name: The Outer Rim
mod_ideas.description: Procedurally generated planets beyond the Belt. Infinite exploration.

mod_ideas.name: Cosmic Breeding
mod_ideas.description: Breed Pokémon in zero-G for rare cosmic-type variants.

mod_ideas.name: Holodeck Challenges
mod_ideas.description: Simulated Earth environments. Nostalgia-driven puzzle dungeons.
